props.ChoiceText: For a time, people stopped speaking of the office and spoke instead of you, as though the bench and your judgment had become the same thing.
props.ChoiceBio: When office became law, you learned how near civic authority lies to personal power.

0.TransitionText: Because office became law taught you how near civic authority lies to personal power, office remained your daily craft.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Magistrate, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TargetText: Powerful people now sent for you by name rather than merely by office.
1.TransitionText: Because office became law taught you how near civic authority lies to personal power, office remained your daily craft.

0.TargetText: A petitioner, clerk, or patron now treats your personal favor as if it were a law of the city.
